diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,165 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, knownUserAgents
+- Reads as: imports Context from context, defines Runtime type
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Runtime environment detection for cross-platform support
+
+## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
+- Main exports or names: accepts, Accept, acceptsConfig, acceptsOptions, defaultMatch
+- Reads as: imports Context from context, parseAccept from utils/accept
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
+- Safe summary: Matches Accept headers with configuration
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, deleteCookie
+- Reads as: imports Context from context, parse/parseSigned/serialize from utils/cookie
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Cookie management utilities for request/response
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, minify, rawCssString
+- Reads as: standalone utility functions
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Safe summary: Core CSS generation utilities with class name hashing and minification
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext
+- Reads as: imports from helper/html, jsx/dom/css, css/common
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Safe summary: CSS helper with template string interface for server/client rendering
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: imports from context, utils/color, utils/handler, types
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Development helper for inspecting routes and router names
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware, CreateHandlersInterface
+- Reads as: imports Hono from hono, types from types, HonoOptions, Env
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/hono.ts
+- Safe summary: Factory pattern for creating Hono app instances and handlers
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: imports from utils/html
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Safe summary: HTML template string interface with escaping support
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy, hopByHopHeaders, ALLOWED_TOKEN_PATTERN
+- Reads as: imports HTTPException from http-exception, RequestHeader from utils/headers
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Fetch API wrapper for proxying requests with header management
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: imports Context from context, types from types, url utilities
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Route information extraction utilities for matched requests
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: exports ssg and middleware functions (ssg.ts, middleware.ts, plugins.ts)
+- Reads as: re-exports from ssg, middleware, and plugins modules
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG helper with static file generation and plugin system
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY
+- Reads as: imports Context from context, SSGParams type
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Safe summary: Middleware for SSG route definition and context handling
+
+## src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Main exports or names: defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin
+- Reads as: imports html from helper/html, SSGPlugin type from ssg.ts
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Standard SSG plugins for response handling and redirects
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, defaultExtensionMap
+- Reads as: imports Hono from hono, types from types, creates pool from utils/concurrent, utils from utils/mime, SSG helper modules
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Safe summary: Core SSG implementation with file system and async route generation
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: joinPaths, dirname, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: imports from hono, router, types, handler utilities
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Safe summary: String path manipulation utilities for static generation
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText, SSEStreamingApi
+- Reads as: re-exports from stream and sse modules
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/utils.ts
+- Safe summary: Streaming helper for real-time content delivery
+
+## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage
+- Reads as: imports Context from context, html resolution utilities, stream utilities
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Safe summary: Server-Sent Events streaming with proper message formatting
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, StreamingApi
+- Reads as: imports Context from context, StreamingApi from utils/stream
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Safe summary: Base streaming interface with TransformStream handling
+
+## src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamText
+- Reads as: imports TEXT_PLAIN from context, imports from stream
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Safe summary: Plain text streaming with content-type headers
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: imp
